title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Gantt charts now available**: Gantt charts display tasks as horizontal bars on a continuous axis to visualize project schedules, manufacturing workflows, and other time-ranged events. Each bar requires matching start and end field types (date, datetime, or numeric). See [Gantt chart](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/types#gantt).
* **Custom visualizations (Public Preview)**: Build custom charts with the Vega-Lite library for customization beyond the built-in visualization types. See [Custom visualizations in AI/BI dashboards](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/custom-visualizations).
* **Per-category font customization**: You can now customize fonts per category across all visualization types. See [Customize colors and fonts](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/settings#custom-font).
* **Table row cross-filtering and drill-through**: Select table rows to cross-filter, or right-click to drill through.
* **Cross-filtering and drill-through**: Line, combo, and area charts now support cross-filtering and drill-through filters. See [Use drill-through to filter data](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filters#drill-through-filter).
* **Dashboard details in draft mode**: Draft mode now shows dashboard details, making it easier to find dashboard managers and the dashboard's location.
* **New metric view low-code editor syntax (Public Preview)**: The following syntax is now available in the metric view low-code editor:
  + `JOIN … RELY`
  + `WINDOW OFFSET`
  + `WINDOW INCLUSIVITY`
* **Genie Code metric view usage**: Genie Code now relies more heavily on Unity Catalog metric views rather than creating local ones.
* **Global filters pane fix**: Fixed a bug where the global filters pane did not open on a user's first view of a dashboard.
* **Widget copy-paste fix**: Fixed a bug where users could not copy and paste widgets across dashboards.
* **Tableau line chart import fix (Beta)**: Fixed an issue where multi-series line charts imported from Tableau files were recreated as separate line charts.
